items.title: Margin & Customer Assurance Workspace
items.description: Release of Margin & Customer Assurance Workspace exists to Give leaders a tighter view of margin, service cost, and customer assurance so commercial tradeoffs stay grounded in reliable operational evidence. The quarter concentrates on traceability, formulation governance, quality-by-design, and sustainability evidence so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase gross margin stability by strengthening customer-specific specs, order transparency, and margin visibility workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase cost-to-serve visibility by strengthening customer-specific specs, order transparency, and margin visibility workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase arr by strengthening customer-specific specs, order transparency, and margin visibility workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Released Ingredient & Nutrient Data Model with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Scenario Engine (What-if Workspace) with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Reformulation & Scenario Simulation with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Unified KPI Dashboards with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed workflow updates in Impact Factors API.
Deployed workflow updates in Recipe Impact API.

items.title: Supplier Qualification & Spec Exchange Release
items.description: Release of Supplier Qualification & Spec Exchange improvements aimed at moving Price update latency and Inbound interest, anchored in traceability, formula governance, and quality evidence under tighter customer and regulatory scrutiny and led through Supplier Onboarding & Qualification. The quarter concentrates on traceability, formulation governance, quality-by-design, and sustainability evidence so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Decrease price update latency by improving supplier onboarding & qualification and removing avoidable workflow friction.
Increase supplier performance by strengthening supplier onboarding & qualification and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase inbound interest by strengthening supplier onboarding & qualification and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase outbound touch effectiveness by strengthening supplier onboarding & qualification and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Decrease mean time to recover (mttr) by improving supplier onboarding & qualification and removing avoidable workflow friction.
Decrease latency p95 by improving supplier onboarding & qualification and removing avoidable workflow friction.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase inbound interest by strengthening supplier onboarding & qualification and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase outbound touch effectiveness by strengthening supplier onboarding & qualification and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Released Supplier Onboarding & Qualification with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Spec Exchange & Change Notifications with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Spec Management (Product & Material) with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Document & Certificate Center with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed workflow updates in Supplier Spec API.
Deployed workflow updates in Change Notification API.

items.title: Traceability & Spec Control Hub
items.description: Release of Traceability & Spec Control Hub exists to Stabilize the data and evidence backbone behind specifications, supplier changes, and compliance artifacts so platform reliability improves without manual audit reconstruction. The quarter concentrates on traceability, formulation governance, quality-by-design, and sustainability evidence so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase operational reliability of the landscape by strengthening spec exchange, evidence controls, and platform observability and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase availability & performance by strengthening spec exchange, evidence controls, and platform observability and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase arr by strengthening spec exchange, evidence controls, and platform observability and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Released Supplier Onboarding & Qualification with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Spec Exchange & Change Notifications with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Spec Management (Product & Material) with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Document & Certificate Center with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed workflow updates in Supplier Spec API.
Deployed workflow updates in Change Notification API.
